summary_one_line: A valid sfnt header plus the literal 'post' table tag at the directory so the post table parses and get_glyph_name returns true.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed TrueType/sfnt header (magic 00 01 00 00) followed by a table directory entry whose 4-byte tag equals the ASCII literal 'post' (70 6f 73 74), so harfbuzz locates and parses the post table and ot_face->post->get_glyph_name returns true.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed begins with 00 01 00 00 and carries the literal bytes 70 6f 73 74 ('post') at offset 0x0c, the exact 4-byte sfnt table tag the loader matches; the byte diff shows offsets 0x0c-0x0f concentrated on p/o/s/t in W and unrelated bytes in L.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds carry no 'post' tag at offset 0x0c (bytes are 00/2c/2b etc.) and most lack the 00 01 00 00 sfnt magic, so the post table is never matched/parsed and get_glyph_name falls through to the false branch.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile. The 4-byte tag comparison in the sfnt directory scan is logged by CmpLogObserver and substituted directly into the input by I2SRandReplace, planting the exact 'post' literal; plain value_profile only gets a CMP_MAP prefix-distance gradient toward the tag and never lands the full 4-byte match in 10 trials.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocking branch is the post-table glyph-name call whose true side is globally blocked.
The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog beating value_profile with technique delta I2S.
The winner resolved all 10 trials while the loser was blocked in all 10.
Winner-resolving seeds carry a valid sfnt magic and the literal 'post' table tag.
Multiple winner seeds repeat the 'post' tag at offset 0x0c with sfnt magic.
At offsets 0x0c-0x0f the winner bytes are concentrated on the ASCII characters p/o/s/t while the loser bytes are unrelated.
The loser bytes at offset 0x0c are not the 'post' tag character p.
Loser-blocking seeds take the false branch and lack the post-table structure.
value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator that plants comparison operands directly into the input.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator and only the CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5441 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed a5465e0cbf5a7934` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 26 of the 27-level ancestor chain; tool reports '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 26', the unwrapped-I2SRandReplace floor signal for vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose post-table tag comparison is required, in which value_profile_cmplog and value_profile resolve the true branch at statistically indistinguishable rates, would refute the I2S-substitution attribution.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte diff only directly shows the 'post' tag at offset 0x0c; the deeper post-table sub-fields (version/length at 0x10+) that get_glyph_name actually dereferences are inferred from source rather than pinned to specific concentrated diff offsets.
